prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of the same man from the uploaded reference image, preserving his facial identity, curly dark hair, neatly trimmed beard, warm smile, medium skin tone, and glossy black-rimmed square eyeglasses. He is sitting casually on the rear deck of a red high-performance BMW M5 with a large rear wing, parked on an open road beneath dramatic storm clouds. He wears a light gray oversized hoodie, loose black cargo pants, glossy black-rimmed round eyeglasses with smoky semi-translucent lenses that slightly obscure his eyes, and white retro basketball sneakers with red accents. One knee is raised while the other foot hangs naturally over the rear bumper. He looks confidently off into the distance with a thoughtful expression. The composition features a direct rear view of the BMW, showcasing its continuous red LED light strip, bold black 'BMW' lettering, italicized 'M5' emblem, aggressive rear diffuser, and a California license plate reading 'M5' partially obscured by shadow. Low-angle perspective near bumper height makes the subject appear powerful and larger than life. Moody overcast lighting with soft natural shadows. Massive dark blue-gray storm clouds dominate the background. Premium automotive photography blended with editorial street-fashion aesthetics. Highly detailed skin texture, realistic curly hair, premium streetwear styling, glossy red paint reflections, crisp taillights, shallow depth of field, subtle teal-and-orange cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast, ultra-sharp focus, photorealistic, HDR, 8K, professional commercial photography, magazine cover quality. negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, cartoon, anime, CGI, illustration, painting, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, bad hands, bad fingers, crossed eyes, distorted face, low resolution, watermark, logo, text, oversaturated colors, noise, artifacts, cropped subject, out of frame, unrealistic reflections, poor lighting, motion blur. style: photorealistic. camera: model: Sony A7R V, lens: 35mm, aperture: f/2.8, iso: 100, shutter_speed: 1/800. composition: orientation: vertical, aspect_ratio: 2:3, camera_angle: low-angle near bumper height, subject_position: center slightly left, car_position: fills lower half of frame, background: storm clouds dominate upper half, depth_of_field: shallow. lighting: type: natural storm light, quality: diffused sunlight through clouds, mood: cinematic, moody, shadows: soft and clean, highlights: subtle. color_palette: red, charcoal, gray, black, muted blue, white. quality: resolution: 8K, hdr: true, detail: ultra.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of the same man from the uploaded reference image, preserving his facial identity, curly dark hair, neatly trimmed beard, warm smile, medium skin tone, and glossy black-rimmed square eyeglasses. He is sitting casually on the rear deck of a red high-performance BMW M5 with a large rear wing, parked on an open road beneath dramatic storm clouds. He wears a light gray oversized hoodie, loose black cargo pants, glossy black-rimmed round eyeglasses with smoky semi-translucent lenses that slightly obscure his eyes, and white retro basketball sneakers with red accents. One knee is raised while the other foot hangs naturally over the rear bumper. He looks confidently off into the distance with a thoughtful expression. promptZh: 超写实电影感肖像，主体为上传参考图中的同一男子，保留其面部特征、深色卷发、修剪整齐的胡须、温暖的微笑、中等肤色以及亮黑色边框方形眼镜。他随意地坐在红色高性能 BMW M5 的后备箱盖上，该车配有大型尾翼，停在暴风云密布的开阔公路上。他身穿浅灰色超大款连帽衫、宽松黑色工装裤、带有烟熏半透明镜片的亮黑色圆框眼镜（略微遮住双眼），以及带有红色点缀的复古白色篮球鞋。他的一只膝盖抬起，另一只脚自然地垂在后保险杠上方。他神情沉思，自信地望向远方。构图采用 BMW 的正后方视角，展示了其贯穿式红色 LED 灯带、醒目的黑色“BMW”字样、斜体“M5”徽标、激进的后扩散器，以及阴影中若隐若现的加州车牌“M5”。保险杠高度附近的低角度视角使主体显得强劲且极具张力。阴郁的阴天光线，带有柔和的自然阴影。巨大的深蓝灰色暴风云占据了背景。高端汽车摄影与编辑类街头时尚美学的结合。高度细腻的皮肤纹理、逼真的卷发、高级街头服饰风格、亮红色车漆反射、清晰的尾灯、浅景深、微妙的青橙色电影级调色、强烈的对比度、超锐利对焦、照片级真实感、HDR、8K、专业商业摄影、杂志封面品质。negative_prompt: 低质量、模糊、卡通、动漫、CGI、插画、绘画、畸形解剖结构、多余肢体、重复的身体部位、糟糕的手部、糟糕的手指、对眼、扭曲的面部、低分辨率、水印、Logo、文字、色彩过饱和、噪点、伪影、主体被裁剪、出框、不真实的反射、光线不佳、运动模糊。style: 照片级真实感。camera: model: Sony A7R V, lens: 35mm, aperture: f/2.8, iso: 100, shutter_speed: 1/800。composition: orientation: 竖构图, aspect_ratio: 2:3, camera_angle: 保险杠高度附近的低角度, subject_position: 居中偏左, car_position: 充满画面下半部分, background: 暴风云占据上半部分, depth_of_field: 浅景深。lighting: type: 自然暴风雨光线, quality: 云层过滤后的漫射阳光, mood: 电影感、阴郁, shadows: 柔和且干净, highlights: 微妙。color_palette: 红色、炭灰色、灰色、黑色、柔和蓝色、白色。quality: resolution: 8K, hdr: true, detail: 超高。
